name: Cameron International Corporation
description: Cameron International Corporation (formerly Cooper Cameron Corporation) is a global provider of flow equipment products, systems, and services to the worldwide oil, gas, and process industries. The company offers a comprehensive portfolio of pressure control and flow control equipment, including valves, wellheads, blowout preventers, and aftermarket services. In 2016, Cameron International was acquired by Schlumberger (SLB) and now operates as a subsidiary, continuing to deliver critical technology and engineering solutions for drilling, production, and processing operations globally.
